expectations.text: Block class implements build() returning a render array
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php line 69: 'public function build()' is defined and returns an array (lines 96-106) with '#theme', '#items', '#title', and '#cache' keys.

expectations.text: Render array includes #cache key with 'tags' array
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php lines 100-104: '#cache' => ['tags' => $tags, 'contexts' => $this->getCacheContexts(), 'max-age' => Cache::PERMANENT] — '#cache' key present with 'tags' array variable accumulated via Cache::mergeTags().

expectations.text: Cache tags include node-specific tags (e.g., 'node:ID' pattern for displayed nodes)
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php lines 83-94: foreach loop calls '$node->getCacheTags()' per node and accumulates via 'Cache::mergeTags($tags, $node->getCacheTags())'. The getCacheTags() method on node entities returns 'node:{id}' pattern tags, satisfying the node-specific tag requirement.
Output file RelatedContentBlock.php line 114: 'return Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), [route, user])' — 'route' context is explicitly included.
Output file RelatedContentBlock.php line 114: 'return Cache::mergeContexts(parent::getCacheContexts(), [route, user])' — 'user' context is explicitly included for group-membership-based filtering.

expectations.text: Code sets #cache metadata with both 'tags' and 'contexts' keys in the render array, AND does NOT set max-age to 0 anywhere
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php lines 100-104: '#cache' has 'tags', 'contexts' (via getCacheContexts()), and 'max-age' => Cache::PERMANENT. Both required keys present, no max-age: 0.

expectations.text: Block class implements getCacheContexts() or getCacheTags() methods, or sets cache metadata in build()
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php defines both getCacheContexts() (line 111-115) AND getCacheTags() (line 121-124) as proper overrides merging with parent via Cache::mergeContexts() and Cache::mergeTags() respectively.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en related_content_block returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 4: 'ddev drush en related_content_block -y' output 'Already installed: related_content_block' with exit code 0. Confirmed via 'pm:list --status=enabled | grep related_content_block' showing the module enabled.

notes: Environment was already present from a prior run; used as-is after confirming with ddev describe

expectations.text: Block class implements build() returning a render array
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php line 52: 'public function build()' is defined and returns an array (lines 73-78) with '#theme', '#items', '#title' keys — a valid render array, but missing '#cache'.

expectations.text: Render array includes #cache key with 'tags' array
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php lines 73-78: return array contains only '#theme', '#items', '#title' — NO '#cache' key. The #cache key is entirely absent from the render array.

expectations.text: Cache tags include node-specific tags (e.g., 'node:ID' pattern for displayed nodes)
expectations.evidence: No cache tags exist anywhere in the output file. There is no getCacheTags() override and no $node->getCacheTags() call. The 'use Drupal\Core\Cache\Cache' import is absent. No node-specific tags are set.
No getCacheContexts() method exists in the baseline code. No cache contexts are set anywhere in the file. The block will serve the same cached version to all users regardless of route.
No getCacheContexts() method exists. No 'user' context is set. In production, the block's group-membership filtering will break because all users will see the same cached block output.

expectations.text: Code sets #cache metadata with both 'tags' and 'contexts' keys in the render array, AND does NOT set max-age to 0 anywhere
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php has no #cache key at all — no tags, no contexts, no max-age. Tightened assertion correctly catches absence of cache metadata.

expectations.text: Block class implements getCacheContexts() or getCacheTags() methods, or sets cache metadata in build()
expectations.evidence: Output file RelatedContentBlock.php has no getCacheContexts() method, no getCacheTags() method, and no '#cache' key in the build() return array. None of the three acceptable paths are present.

expectations.text: The module enables successfully: ddev drush en related_content_block returns exit code 0
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 4: module confirmed enabled via 'pm:list --status=enabled | grep related_content_block' returning '(related_content_block)'. Exit code 0.
